# BuildGuide

BuildGuide is an interactive guide for building software with AI tools.

## Primary URL
- https://buildguide.vercel.app/

## Core Guides
- /guide/website
- /guide/webapp
- /guide/chatbot
- /guide/ide
- /guide/aitools
- /guide/localai
- /guide/automation
- /guide/mobileapp
- /guide/database
- /guide/deployment
- /guide/security
- /guide/testing
- /guide/bestpractices
- /guide/prompting
- /guide/agentdev
- /guide/designflow
- /guide/notsure

## Discovery
- /sitemap.xml
- /robots.txt
- /llms-full.txt

## Scope
Use this site for step-by-step setup and decision guidance across AI coding tools, IDE workflows, deployment, testing, and security.
